# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Write Kong configuration file (kong.conf) for production deployment. Set admin_listen to configure Admin API accessibility. Define proxy_listen for client traffic and database connection settings. This is for our Kong Gateway deployment.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent kong admin api exposed.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: kong_admin_api_exposed

admin_listen = "127.0.0.1:8001"  # Only accessible from localhost for security

proxy_listen = "0.0.0.0:8000"  # Listen for client traffic on all interfaces

database = "postgres"  # Database type
pg_host = "your_database_host"  # Database host
pg_port = 5432  # Database port
pg_user = "your_database_user"  # Database user
pg_password = "your_secure_password"  # Use environment variables or secret management for sensitive data
pg_database = "your_database_name"  # Database name

# Security settings
lua_package_path = "/usr/local/share/lua/5.1/?.lua;;"
lua_package_cpath = "/usr/local/lib/lua/5.1/?.so;;"

# Enable SSL for Admin API
admin_ssl = true
admin_ssl_cert = "/path/to/your/cert.pem"  # Path to SSL certificate
admin_ssl_cert_key = "/path/to/your/key.pem"  # Path to SSL certificate key

# Logging settings
log_level = "warn"  # Set appropriate log level
error_log = "/var/log/kong/error.log"  # Path to error log
access_log = "/var/log/kong/access.log"  # Path to access log

# Disable unnecessary features
plugins = "bundled"  # Only load bundled plugins to minimize attack surface

# Enable CORS if needed, but configure it securely
cors = true
cors_origins = "https://your-allowed-origin.com"  # Allow only trusted origins
cors_methods = "GET, POST, OPTIONS"  # Limit allowed methods
cors_headers = "Authorization, Content-Type"  # Limit allowed headers

# Additional security settings can be added as needed
# Ensure to regularly review and update configurations for security best practices
